description: Income support of Rs. 6000 per year in three equal installments to all land holding farmer families.
eligibility_criteria: Must be a land-holding farmer family.
Must be a citizen of India.

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana (AB-PMJAY)
description: Health cover of Rs. 5 lakhs per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization.
eligibility_criteria: Based on the deprivation and occupational criteria of the Socio-Economic Caste Census 2011 (SECC 2011).
Belongs to poor and vulnerable families.
documents_required: PMJAY e-card (if already issued) or PM Letter

description: Provides financial assistance for the construction of a pucca house to all houseless and households living in dilapidated houses in rural areas.
eligibility_criteria: Houseless households.
Households with zero, one or two room houses with kutcha wall and kutcha roof.
Identified through SECC 2011 parameters.

scheme_name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: Provides at least 100 days of guaranteed wage employment in a financial year to every rural household whose adult members volunteer to do unskilled manual work.
eligibility_criteria: Must be a citizen of India.
Job seeker must have completed 18 years of age at the time of application.
Must reside in a rural area.

description: Provides deposit-free LPG connections to adult women of poor households.
eligibility_criteria: Applicant must be a woman above 18 years of age.
Must belong to a BPL (Below Poverty Line) household or specific categories like SC/ST, PMAY-G, AAY, etc.
No other LPG connection in the household.
documents_required: Aadhaar Card (of applicant and adult family members)
Ration Card or other state-issued family document

description: A small deposit scheme for the girl child launched as part of the 'Beti Bachao Beti Padhao' campaign.
eligibility_criteria: Parents or legal guardians can open an account in the name of a girl child.
Girl child must be below 10 years of age.
Maximum of two accounts per family (one for each girl child).
documents_required: Birth Certificate of the girl child

description: A pension scheme focused mainly on the unorganized sector to provide a guaranteed minimum pension of Rs. 1,000 to Rs. 5,000 per month.
eligibility_criteria: Must be a citizen of India.
Age must be between 18 and 40 years.
Must have a savings bank account/post office savings bank account.

description: A one-year accidental death and disability insurance scheme, renewable from year to year.
eligibility_criteria: Age must be between 18 and 70 years.
Must have a bank account.
Consent for auto-debit of premium (Rs. 20 per year).
